label: TSMM to OpenID Federation binding
description: Maps OpenID Federation concepts into TSMM abstractions for cross-ecosystem reasoning and topology comparison.

mappings.description: Participating domain within a governed federation context.
Operates governance logic and authority chains for the federation.
Registry-like publication and trust anchor function over federation statements.
Entity issuing signed assertions or tokens into the trust ecosystem.
Verifier of signed assertions, metadata, and trust chains.
Signed metadata artifact functioning as a credential-like trust assertion under policy and governance constraints.

notes: OpenID Federation distributes authority through signed metadata, which TSMM models as a governance and publication graph.
The mapping is approximate where federation semantics bundle governance and publication roles together.
